title: Simple Recall Potion
description: A simple potion that allows  teleporting to your spawn point!
body:
Recall potion from [More Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-artifacts) as a standalone mod

This mod adds a simple recall potion into the game that teleports you to your spawn point!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3161a27aa6fc6c0fa12b9a44f1146002dbab0e0.png)
![Recall Potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c5fc8c1ddd85a9a57a61c0aade11a9b10ac2e6a.gif)

recall potion only works in the dimension the player is in unless the interdimensional config is set to true
